## Validation

- [ ] `npm run verify:quick` (or full `npm run verify` before merge)
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npx playwright test` (or `npm run verify` for full gate incl. multi-device smoke)

## UI evidence (required for UI changes)

- [ ] Mobile screenshot(s)
- [ ] Tablet screenshot(s)
- [ ] Desktop screenshot(s)

## Risk checklist

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Accessibility impact reviewed (keyboard/focus/readability)
- [ ] Senior-friendly copy reviewed
- [ ] Breaking changes documented
